zh.title: B.M.
zh.msg:
2026/05/28

- 新增“动作轮盘”，默认关闭。
- 加强 imod 验证，请勿借号给他人。
- 遇到倒卖B.M.相关资源，请向我们举报。

en.title: B.M.
en.msg:
May 28, 2026

- Strengthened iMOD verification. Do not share your account with others!
- Added Action Wheel (disabled by default).
- Please report any unauthorized resale of B.M. related resources.

note: 检测 ver 变动才会跳公告 Klei商店 快来看看Klei商店最新上架的好东西吧！ http://store.kleientertainment.com
